---
title: "SickleInAfrica Data Quality Certificate"
author: "Author: SaDACC Data Analysis Team"
date: "Report generated on: `r Sys.Date()`"
params:
  input_filename: 
  output_directory:
output: 
    html_document:
        theme: united
        css: background.css
        

    

---



<center>

![](assets/silver.png){height=150px}

</center>

<style type="text/css">

h1.title {
  font-size: 28px !important;
  color: DarkRed !important;
  text-align: center !important;
  padding-bottom: 40px !important;
  padding-top: 20px !important;
}
h4.author { /* Header 4 - and the author and data headers use this too  */
  font-size: 18px !important;
  font-family: "Times New Roman", Times, serif !important;
  color: DarkRed !important;
  text-align: center !important;
}
h4.date { /* Header 4 - and the author and data headers use this too  */
  font-size: 18px !important;
  font-family: "Times New Roman", Times, serif !important;
  color: DarkRed !important;
  text-align: center !important;
}
</style>

```{r global_options, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, fig.pos = 'h')
```

```{css toc-content, echo = FALSE}

.main-container {
    margin-top: 0px !important;
    text-align: center !important;
    align: middle !important;
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, results="hide")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = '../../')
```

```{r message=FALSE, echo = FALSE, prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
source('./scripts/quality-control/quality-module.R')
```
<br>
```{r message=FALSE, echo = FALSE, prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
import_data(params$input_filename) -> data
list(
	test_record_completeness(data),
	test_column_completeness(data),
	test_duplicates(data)) -> results
merge_boxplot_data(results) -> boxplot_data
get_composite_fivenum(results) -> total_fivenum
```

<center>

```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width="50%", fig.cap="A nice image."}
knitr::include_graphics('./scripts/quality-control/assets/logo.png')
```

</center>

<br>

```{r message=FALSE, comment="", prompt=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
get_summary_table(data, total_fivenum) %>%
  kbl() %>% 
  kable_styling()
```

<br>
